items.title: Paris museum unveils Princess Diana wax statue in 'revenge dress'
items.author: Reuters
items.content: <article>Paris' Grevin Museum inaugurated a wax statue of Princess Diana on November 20, a move postponed for nearly 30 years by the renowned wax museum after the British icon died in a car crash. Grevin Director General Yves Delhommeau said the museum had originally planned to produce a wax copy of Diana in 1996.#princessdiana #wax #statue #paris #museum</article>

items.title: Syrian hunters chase migratory falcons
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>In the wide, empty stretches of northeast Syria’s wilderness, hunters in pickup trucks scan the skies for migratory falcons that pass briefly overhead each autumn. The hunters say the cultural tradition targets saker and peregrine falcons, prized birds that travel through Syria along a major migratory route.
 
#syria #falcon #hunter #tradition</article>

items.title: Chadwick Boseman honored with posthumous Hollywood star
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Late actor Chadwick Boseman was honored with the 2,828th star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame on November 20. Director Ryan Coogler and actor Viola Davis were among the speakers at the event, with Boseman’s widow, Simone Ledward Boseman, accepting the honor on Chadwick Boseman's behalf.

#chadwickboseman #hollywoodstar #walkoffame #entertainment</article>

items.title: 💸 Jim Henson's puppets to hit auction block for first time
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A collection of more than 400 original puppets, props and personal items from the Jim Henson Company — including pieces from 'Fraggle Rock,' 'The Dark Crystal,' 'Labyrinth' and other iconic productions — are going on the auction block for the first time for their 70th anniversary.

items.title: Amputee soccer players defy lost limbs to send hope from Gaza
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>Leaning on crutches and adjusting artificial limbs laid out beside the field touchline, dozens of Palestinian amputees gathered in central Gaza for a soccer tournament. They said it's about pursuing dreams, love for the sport and conveying a message of hope.
 
#gaza #soccer #football #sports #amputee
